question: Does the top green directional sign now read "East Ring Blvd" instead of "East Ring Rd"?
Is the arrow on the "East Ring Blvd" sign preserved in its original position and pointing to the right?
Does the new text "Blvd" on the green sign match the original font style, weight, and white color?
Does the green sign background retain its reflective material appearance and realistic glare over the edited text area?
Does the construction notice board display the end date as "Apr 10, 2026"?
Does the new date "Apr 10, 2026" maintain the original font style, size, and character kerning of the printed notice?
Does the red banner text now read "SAFETY FIRST – OUR SHARED DUTY"?
Does the new banner text "OUR SHARED DUTY" realistically follow the fabric wrinkles and cast shadows?
Is the red circular "DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS" stamp on the notice board completely intact and free of distortion?
Is the "West Ring Rd" text and its left-pointing arrow on the green sign unchanged?
Is the construction start date "Feb 15, 2026" unchanged on the notice board?
Are the blue distance signs for "Train Station" and "City Hall" unchanged?
Is the edited text on the green sign free of visible artifacts, blurring, or halo effects?
Is the edited text on the construction notice board free of artifacts, color bleeding, or inconsistent spacing?
Is the edited banner text free of jagged edges, unnatural flattening, or artifacts?
Are all edited text areas clearly legible and free of spelling errors or gibberish?
